moments.title: Glasgow hosts Commonwealth Games 2026
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games officially kick off in Glasgow this Thursday, running until August 2nd with over 3,000 athletes competing across various sports.

angles.name: Opening Excitement
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! Glasgow is buzzing as the Commonwealth Games 2026 officially open this Thursday. Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: Team Wales/Local Buzz
angles.copy: Team Wales is heading to Glasgow for the Commonwealth Games, starting Thursday! Send your good luck messages for our athletes!

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The final of Love Island UK series 13 is set to air next Monday, July 27th, crowning the winning couple after eight weeks in the villa.

angles.name: Final is Looming
angles.copy: It's almost over! The Love Island UK final is just one week away. Who do you think will take home the £50k?

angles.name: Catch Up Tonight
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island? Get your daily dose of villa drama tonight at 9pm on ITV2/ITVX before next week's final!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for hits like 'Smooth' and 'Black Magic Woman', celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 20th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only guitar maestro, Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana track to crank up?

angles.name: Smooth Sounds
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! His incredible talent has given us so many unforgettable songs.

moments.title: Slash of Guns N' Roses turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday on Wednesday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wednesday is Slash's 61st birthday! The legendary Guns N' Roses guitarist still shreds harder than anyone. What's his best riff?

angles.name: 80s Rock Icon
angles.copy: Before you were even born, Slash was delivering iconic guitar solos! Wishing the Guns N' Roses legend a happy 61st birthday this Wednesday.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Thursday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 this Thursday. What's your ultimate J.Lo dancefloor anthem?

angles.name: 00s Pop Princess
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to global icon, Jennifer Lopez is 57 on Thursday! Which of her 00s hits is your favourite?

moments.title: Mick Jagger of The Rolling Stones turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on Saturday, July 26th.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 on Saturday?! Still rocking stages like no other. What's your favourite Stones classic?

angles.name: 60s Legend
angles.copy: The ultimate rock 'n' roll icon, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday this Saturday! So many incredible hits across the decades.

moments.title: AIG Women's Open at Royal Lytham & St Annes
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open golf championship begins next Wednesday, July 29th, at Royal Lytham & St Annes, running until August 2nd.

angles.name: Major Women's Golf
angles.copy: The world's best women golfers head to Royal Lytham & St Annes next week for the AIG Women's Open! Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: Lancashire Hosting
angles.copy: Lancashire is gearing up to host the AIG Women's Open starting next Wednesday. A huge event for women's sport in the UK!

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is currently the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1 for the week ending July 23, 2026.

angles.name: New Number 1
angles.copy: It's official! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are at Number 1 on the UK Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'. Are you loving it?

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean on their UK Number 1 single 'Rein Me In'! The official chart is out now.

moments.title: Don Henley of The Eagles turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Eagles legend Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your favourite song he sang lead on?

angles.name: Hotel California
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Don Henley, turning 79 on Wednesday! An absolute icon of rock.

moments.title: Martin Gore of Depeche Mode turns 65
moments.blurb: Martin Gore, primary songwriter and co-founder of the iconic synth-pop band Depeche Mode, celebrates his 65th birthday on Wednesday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Depeche Mode's Martin Gore this Wednesday! His songwriting shaped the sound of a generation. What's your favourite Depeche Mode track?

angles.name: Electronic Music Master
angles.copy: Martin Gore, a true pioneer of electronic music, turns 65 on Wednesday! So many incredible Depeche Mode tracks thanks to him.

moments.title: Summer School Holidays begin for many
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays for many pupils in England and Scotland begin this week, joining Wales where holidays started earlier.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: It's official! Summer holidays are here for many of you across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Local Holiday Fun
angles.copy: School's officially out for summer in Devon! Wishing all our students a fantastic, sunny break!

moments.title: T100 Triathlon in London
moments.blurb: The T100 Triathlon event takes place in London this weekend, July 25th-26th, bringing top athletes to the capital.

angles.name: London Triathlon
angles.copy: Get ready, London! The T100 Triathlon is in town this weekend, bringing elite athletes to compete across the capital. Who's heading down to watch?

angles.name: Weekend Sport
angles.copy: Big weekend for sport in London with the T100 Triathlon taking place Saturday and Sunday. Expect some incredible endurance!

moments.title: Kate Bush turns 68
moments.blurb: The iconic and influential British singer-songwriter Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on Thursday, July 30th.

angles.name: Wuthering Heights Icon
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the legendary Kate Bush this Thursday! Her unique sound continues to inspire. What's your favourite Kate Bush song?

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 68th birthday to the incredible Kate Bush on Thursday. A truly original artist.

moments.title: Paul Anka turns 85
moments.blurb: Veteran singer, songwriter, and actor Paul Anka, known for hits like 'Diana' and 'Put Your Head on My Shoulder', celebrates his 85th birthday on Thursday, July 30th.

angles.name: Timeless Crooner
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the legendary Paul Anka this Thursday! A true timeless crooner with an incredible catalogue of songs. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: From 'Diana' to 'My Way', Paul Anka has penned some of the biggest hits. He turns 85 this Thursday!

moments.title: Buddy Guy turns 90
moments.blurb: Blues guitar legend Buddy Guy, a major influence on rock icons like Eric Clapton and Jimi Hendrix, celebrates his 90th birthday on Thursday, July 30th.

angles.name: Blues Icon
angles.copy: A huge happy 90th birthday to the living blues legend, Buddy Guy, this Thursday! An absolute master of the guitar. What's your favourite blues track?

angles.name: 90 Years of Blues
angles.copy: Celebrating 90 years of incredible blues music! Happy Birthday to the legendary Buddy Guy this Thursday.
